"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2021.3\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Hospitals.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Hospitals.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Hospitals.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Hospitals.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Hospitals.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libHospitals.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Hospitals.dir\linklibs.rsp
